scripts.deps: npm run shared && npm run core && npm run preload
scripts.main: wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cd apps/main && npm run build && npm run start
scripts.renderer:typecheck: cd apps/renderer && npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck: npm run shared:typecheck && npm run core:typecheck && npm run deps && npm run preload:typecheck && npm run main:typecheck && npm run renderer:typecheck
scripts.test: npm run shared && npm run core:test
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
